name: Le Relais Montmartre
review_highlight: Charming, boutique-style hotel that exceeded expectations in every way.
description: Le Relais Montmartre, nestled in Paris' heart near Butte Montmartre, offers cozy rooms with floral fabrics, ensuite facilities, and flat-screen TVs. Guests enjoy free Wi-Fi, continental breakfast in their room or vaulted cellar, and proximity to Sacré-Cœur, Place du Tertre, and metro.

reviews.author: Élise M.
reviews.text: Perfect location, beautiful design, lovely staff.

reviews.author: Tom R.
reviews.text: Charming room, a touch noisy from the boulevard.
